name: Defeat Lord Dracula
summary: Uncover Dracula's weakness and confront him in the castle.

requirements.description: Place Igor in a village/town with dialogue options about defeating Dracula.
Main questline for defeating Lord Dracula must exist.

name: Sacred Tome
summary: Recover the Sacred Tome from Dracula's castle archives.

requirements.description: Place a Librarian in Dracula's Castle tied to the Sacred Tome quest.
Include Sacred Tome side quest in world quest pool.

name: Night Caravan
summary: Escort a caravan that only travels under moonlight.

requirements.description: Ensure at least one farmland tile for caravan route.
Place Captain Marla in a town to brief the caravan route.

name: Grave Sigil
summary: Gather sigils from cursed burial grounds.

requirements.description: Ensure at least one mountain tile with cursed landmark hooks.

name: Big Scary Wolf
summary: Track a wolf terrorizing settlements near the woods.

requirements.description: Spawn a dense forest tile for the wolf hunt.

name: Bandit Den
summary: Clear out a hidden den raiding nearby roads.

requirements.description: Spawn an additional dense forest tile for the bandit den.
Place Warden Bren in a town to provide den intel.

name: River Toll
summary: Negotiate or fight for passage at a flooded crossing.

requirements.description: Ensure at least one ocean/coastal tile for river crossing events.
Place Ferryman Colt in a town to negotiate crossing terms.
